---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new detection capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Gap

What problem are you trying to solve, or what is the script currently missing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like added or changed.

## Use Case

How would this help in a real migration scenario?

## Willing to Implement?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR for this
- [ ] No, requesting for others to consider

## Additional Context

Any references, links, or examples.
